title: Rate at which West Bengal tribunals restoring names of deleted electors proves genuine voters not allowed to vote: Prasenjit Bose
description: Prasenjit Bose serves as the chairperson, SIR Committee of West Bengal Pradesh Congress Committee emphasised that with over 60 % electors restored to voter list by the tribunals it is clear that genuine electors were deprived of their right to vote in the 2026 West Bengal assembly election
